zh.lifeSummary: 當Manfred III Marquess of Saluzzo於1210年出生在義大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左時，他的父親Boniface of Saluzzo31歲，母親Maria Di Torres29歲。他和Beatrice de Savoie至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1244年10月29日在他的家鄉享年34歲，埋葬在布吉納法索布歐可爾 度 姆素盧迪迪。

nameMeanings.name: Manfred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an old Germanic personal name, usually said to be from man ‘man’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. However, it is more likely that the first element was magin ‘strength’ (the usual Norman form being Mainfred) or manag ‘much’. This name was in use among the Normans, who introduced it to Britain. However, it did not become part of the common stock of English given names, and was reintroduced from Germany in the 19th century. It was a traditional name among the Hohenstaufens, and was borne by the last Hohenstaufen king of Sicily ( 1258–66 ), who died in battle against papal forces at Benevento. The name was also used by Byron for the central character in his poetic drama Manfred ( 1817 ), a brooding outcast, tormented by incestuous love for his half-sister.

variants.name: Manfried
meanings: From an old Germanic personal name, usually said to be from man ‘man’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. However, it is more likely that the first element was magin ‘strength’ (the usual Norman form being Mainfred) or manag ‘much’. This name was in use among the Normans, who introduced it to Britain. However, it did not become part of the common stock of English given names, and was reintroduced from Germany in the 19th century. It was a traditional name among the Hohenstaufens, and was borne by the last Hohenstaufen king of Sicily ( 1258–66 ), who died in battle against papal forces at Benevento. The name was also used by Byron for the central character in his poetic drama Manfred ( 1817 ), a brooding outcast, tormented by incestuous love for his half-sister.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Manfred III Marquess of Saluzzo was born in 1210, in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy, his father, Boniface of Saluzzo, was 31 and his mother, Maria Di Torres, was 29. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Beatrice de Savoie. He died on 29 October 1244, in his hometown, at the age of 34, and was buried in Di, Di, Sourou, Boucle du Mouhoun, Burkina Faso.

fr.Abbazia di Santa Maria di Staffarda,: Di, Di, Sourou, Boucle du Mouhoun, Burkina Faso
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Manfred III Marquess of Saluzzo est né en 1210, à Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie, son père, Boniface of Saluzzo, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Maria Di Torres, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Beatrice de Savoie. Il est décédé le 29 octobre 1244, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Di, Di, Sourou, Boucle du Mouhoun, Burkina Faso.

de.Abbazia di Santa Maria di Staffarda,: Di, Di, Sourou, Boucle du Mouhoun, Burkina Faso
de.lifeSummary: Als Manfred III Marquess of Saluzzo 1210 in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Boniface of Saluzzo 31 und seine Mutter Maria Di Torres 29. Er hatte mit Beatrice de Savoie mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Oktober 1244 im Alter von 34 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Di, Di, Sourou, Boucle du Mouhoun, Burkina Faso begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Manfred III Marquess of Saluzzo è nato il nel 1210 nel Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, il suo padre, Boniface of Saluzzo, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Maria Di Torres, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Beatrice de Savoie. Morì il 29 ottobre 1244, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Di, Di, Sourou, Boucle du Mouhoun, Burkina Faso.

ja.lifeSummary: Manfred III Marquess of Saluzzoが1210年にイタリアピエモントクウネオサルズゾで生まれた時，父Boniface of Saluzzoは31歳，母Maria Di Torresは29歳であった。彼はBeatrice de Savoieとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1244年10月29日に故郷で34歳で死去し，ブルキナファソボウクル ダ モウhオウンソウロウジージーにて埋葬された。

ko.Abbazia di Santa Maria di Staffarda,: 부르키나파소 부클 드 모우하운 소우루 디 디
ko.lifeSummary: Manfred III Marquess of Saluzzo(이)가 1210년 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 살루즈오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Boniface of Saluzzo(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Di Torres(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Beatrice de Savoie(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1244년 10월 29일 그의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 부르키나파소 부클 드 모우하운 소우루 디 디에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Manfred III Marquess of Saluzzo nasceu em 1210, em Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, Boniface of Saluzzo, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Maria Di Torres, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Beatrice de Savoie. Ele faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1244, em sua cidade natal, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Di, Di, Sourou, Boucle du Mouhoun, Burkina-Fasso.

ru.Abbazia di Santa Maria di Staffarda,: ди, ди, соуроу, боукл ду моухоун, Буркина Фасо
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Manfred III Marquess of Saluzzo родился в 1210 г. в местности салуззо, кунео, пиемонт, Италия, его отцу по имени Boniface of Saluzzo было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Maria Di Torres, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Beatrice de Savoie. Он умер 29 октября 1244 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности ди, ди, соуроу, боукл ду моухоун, Буркина Фасо.
